prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
You've got this! I know the task ahead is tough and you've been procrastinating, but now is the time to take action. Remind yourself why this is important and what the end result will mean for you. Break it down into small steps and focus on tackling each one. Take breaks when you need them, but keep pushing forward. 

You have the skills and determination to see this through. Believe in yourself and don't let that pesky procrastination stop you any longer. This hard work and discipline will pay off in a sense of accomplishment that will carry you through many challenges to come. Now go show what you're truly capable of!
